questions.question: Explain the structure of a decision tree learning model with a diagram. Describe each component.
keyPoints: Root node: first split using most informative feature

questions.question: Why are decision trees considered interpretable models? Give examples of domains where this matters.
keyPoints: Clear if-then rules from root to leaf
Important in healthcare for clinical decisions
Required in finance for regulatory compliance

questions.question: What is recursive partitioning and how does it relate to decision tree construction?
keyPoints: Repeatedly splits data on best feature
Each split maximizes information gain or reduces impurity
Continues until stopping criterion is met

questions.question: Compare classification trees and regression trees.
keyPoints: Classification uses impurity measures; regression uses variance reduction
